traits.name: Aggressive
traits.description: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

traits.name: Gruumsh's Fury
traits.description: The orc deals an extra 4 (1d8) damage when it hits with a weapon attack (included in the attacks).

traits.name: Battle Cry
traits.description: Each creature of the war chief's choice that is within 30 feet of it, can hear it, and is not already affected by Battle Cry gains advantage on attack rolls until the start of the war chief's next turn. The war chief can then make one attack as a bonus action. (1/Day)

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The orc makes two attacks with its greataxe or its spear.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (1d12 + 4 + 1d8) slashing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (1d6 + 4 + 1d8) piercing damage, or 13 (1d8 + 4 + 1d8) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
